prompt: A vertically oriented epic fantasy poster in the style of a prestige television series one-sheet, designed like a Chinese theatrical promotional poster for Game of Thrones. The composition is a dramatic double-exposure silhouette of a woman in left-facing side profile occupying most of the frame, her braided hair forming the crown and upper contour of the silhouette. Inside and around the silhouette, blend a vast dark medieval fantasy world with storm clouds, smoke, mountains, castles, dragons, armies, and fire. At the top inside the head area, place 1 grand stone city or castle complex glowing with pale golden light beneath turbulent clouds, and 3 dragons in the sky: 1 large dragon flying prominently on the upper right and 2 smaller distant dragons near the top edge. In the midsection, show 2 fur-cloaked heroic figures standing close together in a bleak winter atmosphere, one centered and one slightly left, with a looming iron-throne-like structure behind them. In the lower right interior, include 1 icy blue-eyed undead king emerging from darkness. Across the lower half, transition from cold mist and coastal water on the left into burning ruins and orange fire on the right, with 1 medium dragon flying near the center-lower area above the battlefield. Scatter tiny marching soldiers and riders along ridgelines and paths to imply war across the landscape. Use a muted palette of ash white, charcoal black, slate blue, steel gray, sepia, and ember orange, with cinematic high contrast, volumetric fog, painterly photo-collage realism, and intricate textured detail. Leave negative space around the silhouette on a warm off-white paper-like background. Add vertical Chinese slogan text along the upper left margin reading 风暴降临前 传奇永不终结. Add a small English logo area on the left reading GAME OF THRONES. Place a large Chinese title near the lower left reading 冰与火之歌, with the English subtitle "A SONG OF ICE AND FIRE" beneath it. Add small credit text below for the novel author George R. R. Martin. Along the bottom, display 5 house sigils in a horizontal row with bilingual labels: Stark, Lannister, Targaryen, Baratheon, Tarly. Beneath them, add the tagline THE SEVEN KINGDOMS, ONE THRONE.. Premium, moody, majestic, collectible poster design.
